subject: [For Approval] Request to approve CNLS partial fulfillment as Key Project

content.answer:
Hi Jianghong and Ian,

As discussed with Terence during the CB Monthly Meeting on 25 June and with
Bingyu at the CB Workshop on 2 July, we would like to seek your approval to
designate the following initiative as a Key Project for the PM/Dev teams to
prioritize.

Initiative: Enable partial fulfillment for CNLS local shop

   -

   Allow partial fulfillment using CNLS sellers’ available inventory in
   China or nearby local markets.


Rationale:

   -

   CNLS is a key growth pillar for the Shopee platform, with June 2025 ADO
   reaching 3.9 million (+19% YTD).
   -

   Relying on a single source of fulfillment limits potential—when OOS
   (out-of-stock) occurs, CNLS sellers are unable to fulfill orders using
   alternative inventory.
   -

   Enabling partial fulfillment can help recover an estimated 75K ADO by
   reducing OOS impact.


For details, kindly refer to the attachment below.


Thank you.

content.question: Would sellers use this to pay less commissions?

content.answer:
Hi Ian,

Would sellers use this to pay less commissions? Similar to fake 3PF?


For CNLS using PFF, the same monitoring and penalty measures applied to
fake 3PF cases will be enforced.

   -

   Monitor and limit pre-order%
   -

   Monitor seller own fleet channel delivery lead time
   -

   Enforce strict penalties including account suspension and permanent
   disqualification of related GPs from opening local shops


For CNLS with PFF, the commission fee charging can be at order level,
following CB FBS PFF


   -

   Locally fulfilled order: follow local commission
   -

   Overseas fulfilled order: follow cb commission

content.question:
For CNLS with PFF, the commission fee charging can be at order level,
following CB FBS PFF

   - Locally fulfilled order: follow local commission
   - Overseas fulfilled order: follow cb commission





Ok as long as we charge the commissions this way..



*From:* Ren Jiahui <jiahui.ren@shopee.com>
*Sent:* Thursday, 3 July 2025 5:53 pm
*To:* Ian Ho <hoi@sea.com>
*Cc:* Jianghong Liu <jianghong.liu@shopee.com>; Shuning Wang <
shuning.wang@shopee.com>
*Subject:* Re: [For Approval] Request to approve CNLS partial fulfillment
as Key Project



Hi Ian,



Would sellers use this to pay less commissions?

content.answer:
Hi Willyam and Albertus,

CB side would like to raise a Key Project on CNLS (chinese local sellers),
in particular enabling partial fulfillment for them. Kindly see below
approval from Ian and Jianghong. For this, we would like to raise this KP
under Biz PIC (Jianghong) and Product PIC (Joey).

CB side would like to book a session to walk you over the idea and why we
think a KP is needed. Then, followed by submitting a POP, thanks!

Jiahui
